parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor User
participant UpdateUserServlet
participant "userDto:UserDto" as userDto
participant "userDao:UserDao" as userDao
participant users

activate UpdateUserServlet
UpdateUserServlet -> userDto : 生成
activate userDto
UpdateUserServlet -> userDto : setId(id)
UpdateUserServlet -> userDto : setUserId(user_id)
UpdateUserServlet -> userDto : setUserPass(User_password)
UpdateUserServlet -> userDto : setUserName(user_name)
UpdateUserServlet -> userDto : setAddress(address)
UpdateUserServlet -> userDto : setSubAddress(address_sub)
UpdateUserServlet -> userDto : setTel(tel)
UpdateUserServlet -> userDto : setGender(gender)
UpdateUserServlet -> userDao : 生成
activate userDao
UpdateUserServlet -> userDao : updateUser(userDto)
deactivate userDto
userDao -> users : UPDATE文実行
activate users
users --> userDao : true/false
deactivate users
userDao --> UpdateUserServlet : true/false
deactivate userDao
deactivate UpdateUserServlet
@enduml
```
